section_title: Where two persons contract with a third person to undertake a certain
content:
132. Where two persons contract with a third person to undertake a certain

other’s
A and B make a joint and several promissory note to C. A makes it, in fact, as
default
surety for B, and C knows this at the time when the note is made. The fact
that A, to the knowledge of C, made the note as surety for B, is no answers
to a suit by C against A upon the note.
Discharge
